docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $868.25 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, ANA JAHAIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $150.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED BY DEFENDANT IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY VIRGINA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ANA JAHAIRA MARENCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-07-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (HEARING DATE LATER THAN 70 DAYS REQUESTED BY CCSF) TRIAL OF JUL-26-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-06-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
